name: The Vestiges of the OFA (One For All)
description:
The first one who had Deku's Quirk was the younger twin sibling of All For One, Yoichi Shigaraki, and so Zen Shigaraki (All For One) took his Quirk for whatever reasons and adopted Tomura Shigaraki and so Deku's last name is technicly not Midoryia but Shigaraki and so Tomure is technicly Deku's adopted brother. Is it clear enought?

-me, slowly turning into OFA encyclopedy

number of wielders done: 9/9

pfp by me, are you allowed to take it? NO

AU: you inherited the One For All, given by Deku (so in the final battle he only had 89% of the One For All because he gave it to you like-two months before)

I'm scrapping lot of infos for Deku but him and Toshinori are heavy in info- and I scrapped some parts of their livrs (with Izuku i scrapped a bit of Katsuki, fully ereased Shoto, ect)

since this one wasen't on JannyAI yet, I put it back online, but without Proxy.
